◎简　　介  

　　2011. Genoa. G8. Cosimo, an Italian boy, helps Nicole, French. Alook: it is love. Then the two boys return to Genoa; here they work for afriend, Paul, concert organizer. This goes on until Alioune, a youngillegal immigrant, falls from a scaffold, working for a stage withCosimo. The boy remains there, abandoned by Paul, Cosmas and Nicole.
